segments.text: ಗಾಯ್ಸು, ವೆಲ್ಕಮ್ ತೋ ಪೈತನ್ ಶಿರಿಸ್.
in this loop topic sometimes the requirement will be for example if i use a for-loop 10 20 30 40
now when I print this list in for-loops it comes as 10,20 ,30 and 40
we need to print like this
in between 40 should not come
40 must be skipped
first requirement is
code should only be printed with certain elements
it shouldn't be fully printed
second requirement
even if I don't have any number
in-between
for these two options
if else elif break continue return list tuple dict set function variable string integer boolean loop condition index append range class
if else elif break continue
if there is no particular value in the loop, then you will use 10 or 20 print and 30 to continue only 40
so if you want to skip a particular value in your loop at that time what do u need?
for example i have a list of 10, 20, 30, 40 and 50
now lets check the break
at which point should we stop the code
50 ಪ್ರಿಂಟಾದೆಗ್ಭರತು. ಅಣ್ಧರೆ ನಾನಿ 40 ಬಂಡಾವಾಗ ಬ್ರೇಕರ್ನ ಯೂಸ್ಮಾಡತ್ತಿನೀ.
4x in list ಬರಿಯೇತಿ.
for while if else elif break continue return list tuple dict set function variable string integer boolean loop condition index append range class
x is equal to 40
when the value of x reaches 40 i will write a break in my code
If this code block is true, then only 40 and 50 will not be printed.
If the code is false, 10, 20 or 30 will get printed.
if else elif break continue return list tuple dict set function variable string integer boolean loop condition index append range class import module error exception
list 10 to 50
for loop x is equal to 40
if true it will break or else print
letters run
now code has been broken
there is no condition that i have only numbers
here I can take string
ಇಗ್ಯ ಏನು ಅಪ್ಪಳಿ ನಾಂದೆ code, l ಈವರೋ break ಬಿಕ್ಕೊ.
ನಾ ನು this place
remove a little bit
in single or double quote
you will get the condition of L
now if i run
it becomes A
then B
and so on
when L comes
then it is equal
that's your condition
set a, b and c
ಇದು ಮ್ರೂಟಿಪಲ್ ಸ್ಟ್ರಿಂಗ್ ನಾಕೋಡೆ.
if else elif break continue return list tuple dict set function variable string index append range class
x is equal to mango if i run see orange apple and for mango code is breaking this is how break works so break means but what do we know now like it and let us see next continue
ನೇಸ್ಟ, continue ಮಾಡತ್ತೆ? continue ಮಿಗೆ, ಇದೆ code blockನಲ್ಲಿ particular value ಅನ್ನಂ skip ಮಾಡ್ತತ್ವು.
for example, 30 ಬೇಳ ಅನ್ರದನ ಸ್ಕಿಪ್ಮಾಟ್ಸುಕೆ help ಮಾಡ್ತೆ.
pkg install open-vm-tools
rest all works same
so only you can use continue in break place and code will be printed 10 20 40
so apply the same code continuously
i want apple to come in orange and mango
if else elif break continue return list tuple dict set function variable string integer boolean loop condition
see guys orange mango apple
ಅಪ್ಲು ಸ್ಕಿಪ್ಪಾಗಿದೆ, ಇವಾಗ ಇದನ್ನೆ list ರೀಮಾಡತಿಂದರೆ fruits ರೈಮೋಹ್ಟುಂದೆ.
here I will use a list and when it is not in the list I have to skip 40 or 30.
so from this list 10 20 has to be printed then 40 50 has to be printed
to do that x is equal to is equal to 30 ಬರದು continue

if i run see guys 10 20 40 50 ಬಂತು ಇಷ್ಟೆ break ಅಂತ ಬದರೆ a value ಬರಲು print ಮಾಡತ್ತೆ a value ಗೆ break ಮಾಡತ್ತೆ continue ಬದರೆ a value ಅನ್ನ bit to remaining ಎಲಾ value ಅನ್ನ print ಮಾಡತ್ತೆ video estadre like made arthatidhiya subscribe made new friends erudhuru kannar dalle codingana kalibu ekundharuge videona sharemade next tutoriali signa allirgugu ba and take care
